content.en:
Rumble!!!!!

The mountain gate of the Liuli Sect opened, and the figures of the True Ancestors emerged one after another, and the boundless momentum crushed the audience, making the True Ancestors of the Human Race who came with them feel the powerhouse of the Liuli Sect.

Suddenly, several true ancestors of the human race trembled, for fear that the true ancestors of the Liuli Sect would attack directly, then they would probably die in an instant!

But that didn't happen!

These true ancestors of the Liuli Sect were just watching the battle and showing the strength of the Liuli Sect, shocking the Void Heaven Temple and other young people, and they didn't plan to make a move.

I saw that the true ancestors of the Liuli Sect waved away, made way of a road, and a young man in cyan armor stepped out of the void.

"Welcome Xuan Ling True Ancestor!"

A true ancestor of the Liuli Sect bowed his head and said.

Ye Tian's gaze was also on the body of the Xuanling True Ancestor, looking at him carefully.

And the Xuanling True Ancestor was also observing Ye Tian, and when he saw Ye Tiancai's cultivation in the middle of the Great Dao, he didn't care, and he despised it even more in his heart.

The cultivation in the middle of the Great Dao, even if he has the top True Ancestor combat power, he can't fight for a long time, if the enemy is a little stronger, it is enough to consume Ye Tian.

This was the Xuanling True Ancestor's first opinion of Ye Tian.

Of course, as the Supreme True Ancestor, he was qualified to despise any strong person who had not reached the level of the Supreme True Ancestor.

"Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, you want to challenge me, you are very bold!"

Xuanling True Ancestor looked at Ye Tian indifferently and said.

"Not bad!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Let's have a fight, then!"

Xuanling True Ancestor doesn't care about the Dao.

After killing Ye Tian, show his invincible posture, and then enter the Void Heaven True Country, the true ancestors of the Void Heaven True Kingdom must have no courage to resist.

In this way, the loss of the Liuli Sect will be smaller.

As for losing, he never thought about it.

"Come on, then!"

Ye Tian stepped forward and confronted the Xuanling True Ancestor in an empty void.

The battle is on the verge of breaking out.

But at this time, Ye Tian sacrificed a treasure.

It's a cube crystal!

"Go!"

The cube crystal turned into an enchantment and blocked this area, covering Ye Tian and Xuan Ling True Ancestor.

"The Ten Directions Demarcation Stone, the True Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws still has such a treasure. However, this treasure is only fixed in a certain void, and it cannot be broken for a hundred years, unless it is an invincible true ancestor or a dual heavenly dao ancestor who can break the enchantment of the Ten Directions Boundary Stone. This kind of thing is worth a lot, but I didn't expect you to use it here. What, do you want to fight to the death?"

Xuan Ling True Ancestor said with a smile.

"Yes, we can only live one. "

Ye Tian said coldly.

The Ten Directions Demarcation Stone was obtained by him through the small realm of the Wind King and exchanged with a general, and he paid a lot of points, just for this battle.

If there was no Ten Directions Demarcation Stone, even if he hit the Xuanling True Ancestor hard, the people of the Liuli Sect would definitely intervene, and when the time came, he would still not be able to kill the Xuanling True Ancestor, and he would still not be able to change the situation.

Therefore, he purchased the Ten Directions Demarcation Stone and set the enchantment.

In this way, Xuanling True Ancestor will definitely not be able to run, and can only fight with him to the death.

For this battle, to be honest, Ye Tian didn't have much confidence, because he didn't know much about Xuanling True Ancestor.

If the Xuanling True Ancestor was the kind of top-notch Supreme True Ancestor, second only to the Invincible True Ancestor, then he would not be able to defeat the Xuanling True Ancestor no matter what.

The battle is on!

At the beginning, Ye Tian inspired the forbidden body.

As soon as the forbidden body came out, the audience was shocked, and even the Xuan Ling True Ancestor was shocked.

"What, you actually condensed the forbidden body, how could this be !!!"

Xuan Ling True Ancestor couldn't believe it.

The forbidden body must master the power of the dark forbidden at the half-step True Ancestor or True Monarch level, so that it can be refined into a forbidden body at the True Ancestor level.

How hard it is!

If you rely on yourself, it is impossible to master the power of the dark taboo, and even the Dao Ancestor cannot master the power of the dark taboo.

And the hope of becoming a Supreme Dao Ancestor is to master the power of the Dark Taboo, and therefore the True Ancestor who has mastered the power of the Dark Taboo has the hope of becoming a Supreme Dao Ancestor in the future.

Otherwise, you can only rely on some kind of forbidden and strange thing to hope to master the power of dark and forbidden at the Dao Ancestor level.

But how rare the forbidden body is, once it appears, those Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors are afraid that they will have to fight for their lives.

Even in the Divine Heaven Realm, only those Nine Heavenly Forces and the Legendary Forces established by the Domain Ancestor could hope to cultivate a True Ancestor who had mastered the power of the Dark Taboo.

Before, Xuanling True Ancestor thought that Ye Tian's strongest physique was some kind of terrifying physique, but he never thought that it was a forbidden body!

"Damn, he actually mastered the power of the dark taboo, and condensed into a forbidden body, he must be killed in advance, otherwise our Liuli Sect will offend him, and he will inevitably suffer a catastrophe in the future!"

Xuan Ling True Ancestor thought.

He was very glad that this time he had fought with Ye Tian in a life-and-death battle, and Ye Tian had activated the Ten Directions Demarcation Stone, otherwise once Ye Tian escaped, the entire Liuli Sect would have to panic for countless years.

"Be sure to kill him at all costs!"

Xuan Ling True Ancestor thought secretly.

Outside.

Countless True Ancestors who were watching the battle were also shocked when they saw Ye Tian's forbidden body.

"I didn't expect to see a genius with a forbidden body with my own eyes!"

"It's a pity, he doesn't necessarily have to fight with Xuanling True Ancestor to the death, Xuanling True Ancestor is the strongest True Ancestor after all, and Wanfa True Ancestor has only been promoted to True Ancestor not long ago, so there is no need to do so. If he hides for a period of time, ascends to the Supreme True Ancestor, or even becomes an invincible True Ancestor, is he still afraid of a mere Xuanling True Ancestor?"

"Stupid people, they don't know how to forbear!"

"It is said that the Liuli Sect wants to deal with the Void Heaven True Country, and the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor is anxious, so he will do it!"

"Hehe, if I am the true ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws, I don't care what kind of void and true country, I will hide it directly, and after hundreds of millions of years, wouldn't it be good to kill the Liuli Sect?"

Seeing that Ye Tian had mastered the Forbidden Body, the True Ancestor of the Moon Shooting was also very remorseful, he had known that Ye Tian had a forbidden body and had such great potential, he should have persuaded Ye Tian to leave again.

If Ye Tian died, then the Void Heaven Pulse would lose a genius who had a great future and was even expected to be a supreme Dao Ancestor!

------------

"What about the forbidden body, it's just the forbidden body of the entry level, if you are a small level of forbidden body, I'm afraid I won't be able to hurt you at all!

Xuan Ling True Ancestor shouted.

"Dao Technique - Xuandu Fire!"

Endless pale white flames descended, seemingly ordinary flames containing terrifying temperature and the power of rules.

The void began to burn, and it was difficult for any top-notch True Ancestor to withstand the flames of the Xuandu.

Although the Xuanling True Ancestor did not have Dao-level natal talent, his years of cultivation were too long, and he could also be said to be an ancient True Ancestor.

The reason why he was not promoted to the realm of Dao Ancestor was that he wanted to promote Dao Ancestor with the strongest foundation, so that he could hope to be promoted to a higher level in the future.

Because, relying on his hard work and countless opportunities, he cultivated the Dao technique of Xuandu Fire to the realm of Xiaocheng.

As soon as the fire of the Xuandu in the Xiaocheng realm came out, many True Ancestors were surprised and envious, after all, most of the top True Ancestors could only cultivate Dao Techniques to the entry level.

In the face of the Xuandu Fire of the Xuanling True Ancestor, Ye Tian did not underestimate it, and the Dao Technique-Purple Gold True Body was opened!

The fire of Xuandu fell on Ye Tian's body, and it was blocked by the Dao Technique Purple Gold True Body, which could not hurt him in the slightest.

"Extreme level Dao technique!How can it be !!?"

Xuanling True Ancestor was dumbfounded.

At the level of the True Ancestor, it is great to be able to cultivate a Dao technique to Xiaocheng, and cultivating to the realm of Dacheng can be called against the sky, if it is cultivated to the realm of perfection, it is a legend.

If one cultivates a Dao technique to the extreme level, then there is only one possibility.

"You actually have a Dao-level natal talent!"

Xuan Ling True Ancestor said jealously.

If he also has a Dao-level natal talent, now I am afraid that he has the hope of impacting the ranks of the invincible true ancestors, where will he stay in the ranks of the strongest true ancestors!

Ye Tian didn't bother to respond to the Xuanling True Ancestor, and stretched out his hand again-

"Sky Splitting!"

Click!

The void shattered, and the figure of the Xuanling True Ancestor exploded, but it was still injured a little by the Void Splitting Technique, a spatial Dao technique, but it quickly recovered.

"It's another limit-level Dao technique, and it's also a spatial attribute, you actually have more than one Dao-level natal talent, what kind of chance do you have?"

Xuan Ling True Ancestor was so jealous that he went crazy.

Not to mention the Xuanling True Ancestor, the other True Ancestors were also extremely jealous.

They had never seen such a wicked person, they simply did not exist in the world!

"It's just that Xiao Qiandao Technique can't kill Xuanling True Ancestor at all!"

Ye Tian sighed secretly.

The two Dao techniques of the Purple Gold True Body and the Sky Splitting Technique just now were just a test to test the strength of the Xuanling True Ancestor.

It turned out that the Xuanling True Ancestor was not too strong, but his Little Thousand Dao Technique could not severely damage the Xuanling True Ancestor, at most it would cause a little trouble to the other party.

If you continue to fight at this level, you won't be able to kill the Xuanling True Ancestor for 10,000 years.

"You must perform the Thousand Dao Technique-the Great Wilderness Law Body!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This Middle Thousand Dao Technique from Black Wind Mountain, he had already cultivated to the entry realm not long ago, and he had purchased a treasure similar to the Heavenly Soul Pill, and finally reluctantly cultivated the Great Wilderness Law Body to the Xiaocheng realm.

At this point, it's already the limit.

However, the Great Wilderness Law Heaven of the Xiaocheng Realm far surpassed the Xiao Qiandao Technique of the limit level, so he had the confidence to fight with the Xuanling True Ancestor.

"Cast the Great Wilderness Law Body, I will win this battle!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
